scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix wa-finance-be && npm install --prefix wa-finance-fe
scripts.dev: cross-env PORT=3000 DISABLE_BOT=1 EXPO_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 EXPO_PUBLIC_ACCOUNT_ID=1 EXPO_PUBLIC_CURRENCY=IDR concurrently -n be,fe -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix wa-finance-be start" "npm --prefix wa-finance-fe run web -- --non-interactive"
scripts.dev:bot: cross-env PORT=3000 DISABLE_BOT=0 EXPO_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 EXPO_PUBLIC_ACCOUNT_ID=1 EXPO_PUBLIC_CURRENCY=IDR concurrently -n be,fe -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix wa-finance-be start" "npm --prefix wa-finance-fe run web -- --non-interactive"
scripts.test: npm --prefix wa-finance-be test && npm --prefix wa-finance-fe run typecheck
scripts.start: cross-env PORT=3000 DISABLE_BOT=1 npm --prefix wa-finance-be start
scripts.deploy:web: npm run build:web && npm run start
